retry_reason: Not a wrapper; refcount operations are side effects of cleanup, not the primary contract.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free all TX ring buffer entries (skbs, XDP frames, DMA mappings) during ring teardown. The dev_kfree_skb calls are incidental to releasing skb references, not the main goal. Complex loop with multiple conditions (XDP, push, GSO, frags) indicates a cleanup function, not a focused refcount wrapper.
